name: 01-eval-basic-read-search
description: Easy: list, read package metadata, grep for the help command implementation

turns.input: Use list_dir with path "." first. Then use read_file with path "package.json". Then use grep with pattern "function showHelp" and path "src". After the tools finish, reply exactly "PACKAGE=freecode; HELP_FILE=slash-commands.ts" with no extra text. Do not use any other tools.
